title: BOMEI PACK 3 rolls Aluminum foil tape Resistant High Temperature 50 mm x 50 m,Moisture,UV resistant Waterproof for Pipes Repairing,Insulating,heating and ventilation (HVAC) duct work
features: EXCELLENT FEATURE: Resistant flame,Cold and High heat Temperature from -20°C to 180°C,Moisture,Weather,Waterproof,resists UV degradation, chemical resistant tape.
STRONG STICKY: Aluminum foil coated with strong acrylic adhesion and holding power,ideal for ducts repairing and fixing.

APPLICATION: Suitable for winding ,protection and sealing warm and cold pipe,binding the copper tube of refrigerator or icebox.Joining and sealing flexible cool and heat air duct seams and connections,Household electrical appliances,.

MULTIPLE PURPOSE USE: Widely use for heating and cooling efficiency, Automotive, Aerospace, HVAC, Appliance, Metal Finishing, Electronics, Recreational Vehicle, Construction, General Industrial sealing, seaming, shielding, chemical stripping, harness wrapping, joining, vibration damping, , plastic protection, heat shielding, heat reflecting,paint stripping.
EASY USE: Soft aluminum foil can tear by hand easy to fit the surface need repair or masking.,sticky but no residue
description: Product Description Aluminum tape for heating and cooling efficiency,Automotive,HVAC,Appliance,Metal Finishing,electronics,Recreational Vehicle, Construction,General Industrial sealing,seaming,shielding,chemical stripping,harness wrapping,joining,vibration damping,plastic protection,heat shielding,heat reflecting,paint stripping.
